turns.query: Analyze how production schedule variations at Shougang Qian'an Steel (company_id: 2452) correlate with hourly air quality fluctuations in Qian'an City (district_id: 41) during 2025-06-22 to 2025-06-28. Identify optimal production timing to minimize district-level pollution peaks.
turns.actual_response:
2025-06-22至2025-06-28期间，首钢迁安钢铁累计烟气排放量为4,583,491,500立方米；迁安市小时AQI均值为76.89，最高小时AQI为195。

分析结果显示，该企业小时烟气量与迁安市小时AQI的同步相关性较弱，相关系数为0.092；考虑0—12小时滞后后，最强相关出现在排放后约3小时，但相关性仍较弱，相关系数为0.147。说明本周迁安市AQI波动并非主要由该企业总烟气量的小时变化单独解释，区域气象扩散条件、其他污染源、二次转化及背景浓度可能共同影响污染峰值。

分污染物看，企业颗粒物排放与同步AQI的相关性相对更高，相关系数为0.369，高于烟气量、氮氧化物、二氧化硫和一氧化碳。这表明在本时段内，颗粒物排放变化与区域空气质量波动的对应关系更明显，应作为生产调度优化和排放管控的重点关注指标。

高AQI小时的阈值为116。对比高AQI小时与非高AQI小时前0—6小时的企业烟气量，二者平均水平非常接近，比例约为0.984—1.002，未显示出高AQI峰值前企业烟气量显著升高的特征。因此，不宜仅依据烟气总量变化判断污染峰值成因，更应结合颗粒物、氮氧化物排放强度以及气象扩散条件开展联合管控。

从小时规律看，迁安市AQI在13:00—18:00整体偏高，其中13:00、14:00、15:00的小时均值分别达到90.00、90.86、89.29；23:00出现本周最高小时AQI 195。考虑排放影响约3小时滞后后，较不适宜安排高负荷生产的时段主要为10:00—13:00、15:00和20:00，其中10:00—12:00后续对应的平均AQI较高，20:00后续对应的最高AQI风险最高。

相对更适合安排高负荷生产的时段为04:00—07:00、02:00和23:00，其中05:00、04:00、06:00对应滞后约3小时后的AQI水平较低，污染峰值风险相对较小。若需要在不降低总产量的前提下降低区域污染峰值风险，建议将可调节的高排放工序优先安排在04:00—07:00，尽量减少10:00—13:00及20:00附近的高负荷运行。

日尺度上，6月23日和6月24日迁安市空气质量压力最高，日均AQI分别为100.79和104.33，其中6月23日最高小时AQI达到195；但这两日企业日烟气排放量并非全周最高，进一步支持“单一企业总烟气量不是本周AQI峰值唯一主导因素”的判断。建议监管上将生产调度、颗粒物排放强度控制、重点时段在线监控和气象扩散条件预警联动使用，而不是仅按总烟气量进行判断。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd, numpy as np
from sqlalchemy import text

start, end = "2025-06-22 00:00:00", "2025-06-29 00:00:00"
company_id, district_id = 2452, 41

# 先用相同筛选条件统计记录量
cnt = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT
 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission WHERE company_id=:cid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end) AS company_hourly_records,
 (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hourly_district_air_quality WHERE district_id=:did AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end) AS district_hourly_records
"""), engine, params={"cid": company_id, "did": district_id, "start": start, "end": end})
print("记录量核查：")
print(cnt.to_string(index=False))

# 聚合到小时粒度后再分析
em = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT timestamp, SUM(exhaust_gas)::float AS exhaust_gas, SUM(nox)::float AS nox, SUM(so2)::float AS so2,
       SUM(pm)::float AS pm, SUM(co)::float AS co
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id=:cid AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
GROUP BY timestamp ORDER BY timestamp
"""), engine, params={"cid": company_id, "start": start, "end": end})

aq = pd.read_sql(text("""
SELECT timestamp, AVG(aqi)::float AS aqi, AVG(pm2_5)::float AS pm2_5, AVG(pm10)::float AS pm10,
       AVG(so2)::float AS aq_so2, AVG(no2)::float AS no2, AVG(co)::float AS aq_co, AVG(o3)::float AS o3
FROM hourly_district_air_quality
WHERE district_id=:did AND timestamp>=:start AND timestamp<:end
GROUP BY timestamp ORDER BY timestamp
"""), engine, params={"did": district_id, "start": start, "end": end})

company_total_exhaust = float(em["exhaust_gas"].sum(skipna=True)) if len(em) else float("nan")
district_mean_aqi = float(aq["aqi"].mean(skipna=True)) if len(aq) else float("nan")
district_max_aqi = float(aq["aqi"].max(skipna=True)) if len(aq) else float("nan")

df = pd.merge(aq, em, on="timestamp", how="inner").sort_values("timestamp")
df["hour"] = pd.to_datetime(df["timestamp"]).dt.hour
df["date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["timestamp"]).dt.date

print("\n已存储关键结果：")
print(pd.DataFrame([{
    "company_total_exhaust": company_total_exhaust,
    "district_mean_aqi": district_mean_aqi,
    "district_max_aqi": district_max_aqi,
    "matched_hours": len(df),
    "company_hours": len(em),
    "district_hours": len(aq)
}]).to_string(index=False))

# 同步相关性
poll_cols = ["exhaust_gas", "nox", "so2", "pm", "co"]
sync_rows = []
for c in poll_cols:
    sub = df[["aqi", c]].dropna()
    sync_rows.append({
        "indicator": c,
        "n": len(sub),
        "pearson_with_aqi": sub["aqi"].corr(sub[c], method="pearson") if len(sub) >= 3 and sub["aqi"].std() > 0 and sub[c].std() > 0 else np.nan,
        "spearman_with_aqi": sub["aqi"].corr(sub[c], method="spearman") if len(sub) >= 3 and sub["aqi"].std() > 0 and sub[c].std() > 0 else np.nan
    })
print("\n同步相关性汇总：")
print(pd.DataFrame(sync_rows).round(4).to_string(index=False))

# 滞后相关性：lag_hours=L 表示排放发生在AQI之前L小时
lag_rows = []
for L in range(0, 13):
    tmp = df[["timestamp", "aqi"]].merge(
        df[["timestamp", "exhaust_gas", "nox", "so2", "pm", "co"]].assign(timestamp=lambda x: x["timestamp"] + pd.to_timedelta(L, unit="h")),
        on="timestamp", how="inner"
    )
    for c in poll_cols:
        sub = tmp[["aqi", c]].dropna()
        r = sub["aqi"].corr(sub[c]) if len(sub) >= 12 and sub["aqi"].std() > 0 and sub[c].std() > 0 else np.nan
        lag_rows.append({"lag_hours": L, "indicator": c, "n": len(sub), "pearson": r})
lag_df = pd.DataFrame(lag_rows)
best_lag_row = lag_df[lag_df["indicator"].eq("exhaust_gas")].dropna(subset=["pearson"]).iloc[lambda x: x["pearson"].abs().argmax()] if lag_df[lag_df["indicator"].eq("exhaust_gas")]["pearson"].notna().any() else None
best_lag = int(best_lag_row["lag_hours"]) if best_lag_row is not None else 0
print("\n滞后相关性汇总：")
print(lag_df.pivot(index="lag_hours", columns="indicator", values="pearson").round(4).to_string())
print(f"\n排放总烟气量与AQI绝对相关性最强滞后小时：{best_lag}")

# 高AQI时段对比
if len(df) >= 24:
    q90 = df["aqi"].quantile(0.90)
    peak = df[df["aqi"] >= q90].copy()
    base = df[df["aqi"] < q90].copy()
    peak_cmp = []
    for L in range(0, 7):
        shifted = df[["timestamp", "exhaust_gas"]].assign(timestamp=lambda x: x["timestamp"] + pd.to_timedelta(L, unit="h")).rename(columns={"exhaust_gas": f"exhaust_lag{L}"})
        tmp = df[["timestamp", "aqi"]].merge(shifted, on="timestamp", how="inner")
        peak_cmp.append({
            "lag_hours": L,
            "peak_threshold_aqi": q90,
            "mean_exhaust_before_peak": tmp.loc[tmp["aqi"] >= q90, f"exhaust_lag{L}"].mean(),
            "mean_exhaust_non_peak": tmp.loc[tmp["aqi"] < q90, f"exhaust_lag{L}"].mean(),
            "ratio_peak_to_nonpeak": tmp.loc[tmp["aqi"] >= q90, f"exhaust_lag{L}"].mean() / tmp.loc[tmp["aqi"] < q90, f"exhaust_lag{L}"].mean()
        })
    print("\n高AQI时段与非高AQI时段的前置排放对比：")
    print(pd.DataFrame(peak_cmp).round(4).to_string(index=False))

# 分小时生产与空气质量特征，用于识别相对更优生产窗口
hod = df.groupby("hour").agg(
    hours=("aqi", "count"),
    mean_aqi=("aqi", "mean"),
    max_aqi=("aqi", "max"),
    mean_exhaust=("exhaust_gas", "mean"),
    p90_aqi=("aqi", lambda s: s.quantile(0.90))
).reset_index()
future = df[["timestamp", "aqi"]].assign(timestamp=lambda x: x["timestamp"] - pd.to_timedelta(best_lag, unit="h")).rename(columns={"aqi": "aqi_after_best_lag"})
df2 = df.merge(future, on="timestamp", how="left")
timing = df2.groupby("hour").agg(
    hours=("aqi", "count"),
    mean_exhaust=("exhaust_gas", "mean"),
    mean_current_aqi=("aqi", "mean"),
    mean_aqi_after_lag=("aqi_after_best_lag", "mean"),
    max_aqi_after_lag=("aqi_after_best_lag", "max")
).reset_index()
timing["rank_score"] = timing["mean_aqi_after_lag"].rank(method="min") + timing["max_aqi_after_lag"].rank(method="min")
optimal_hours = timing.sort_values(["rank_score", "mean_aqi_after_lag", "max_aqi_after_lag"]).head(6)
avoid_hours = timing.sort_values(["mean_aqi_after_lag", "max_aqi_after_lag"], ascending=False).head(6)

print("\n按小时汇总的生产与AQI特征：")
print(hod.round(3).to_string(index=False))
print("\n相对更适合安排高负荷生产的小时：")
print(optimal_hours[["hour","hours","mean_exhaust","mean_current_aqi","mean_aqi_after_lag","max_aqi_after_lag"]].round(3).to_string(index=False))
print("\n建议避免高负荷生产的小时：")
print(avoid_hours[["hour","hours","mean_exhaust","mean_current_aqi","mean_aqi_after_lag","max_aqi_after_lag"]].round(3).to_string(index=False))

# 日尺度概览
daily = df.groupby("date").agg(hours=("aqi","count"), total_exhaust=("exhaust_gas","sum"), mean_exhaust=("exhaust_gas","mean"), mean_aqi=("aqi","mean"), max_aqi=("aqi","max")).reset_index()
print("\n日尺度汇总：")
print(daily.round(3).to_string(index=False))
